author: Jenny Zhang
message: Revise experiment logs section in README
patch:
commit 4c05234d8e01fbf544c4b403bdc724c6bcef4187
Author: Jenny Zhang <53294998+jennyzzt@users.noreply.github.com>
Date:   Tue Apr 14 12:05:23 2026 -0700

    Revise experiment logs section in README
    
    Updated the experiment logs section to provide a download link and removed extraction instructions.
---
 README.md | 6 +-----
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 5 deletions(-)

diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index 46f6c06..4c1cdae 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -68,11 +68,7 @@ By default, outputs will be saved in `outputs/` directory.
 
 ## Logs from Experiments
 
-The experiment logs are stored as a multi-part ZIP archive. To extract them, ensure all .z01, .z02, etc., files are in the same directory as the .zip file, then run:
-```bash
-zip -s 0 outputs_os_parts.zip --out unsplit_logs.zip
-unzip unsplit_outputs.zip
-```
+The experiment logs can be downloaded here: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/164fKQWgLM18foOzSnpv0F_I3TNpX8u8-?usp=sharing
 
 ## Safety Consideration
 > [!WARNING]

 If you find this project useful, please consider citing:
 ```bibtex
-to insert later
+@misc{zhang2026hyperagents,
+      title={Hyperagents}, 
+      author={Jenny Zhang and Bingchen Zhao and Wannan Yang and Jakob Foerster and Jeff Clune and Minqi Jiang and Sam Devlin and Tatiana Shavrina},
+      year={2026},
+      eprint={2603.19461},
+      archivePrefix={arXiv},
+      primaryClass={cs.AI},
+      url={https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19461}, 
+}
 ```
